hook_tension.label: Hook / tension
hook_tension.visualDirection: Open on people and motion to make the topic feel immediate and human.

icon_pressure.label: Icon pressure
icon_pressure.visualDirection: Use a dense icon field that quickly frames the pressure point or conflict.

system_map.label: System map
system_map.visualDirection: Show the system as connected nodes so the audience sees where the edges are.

causal_chain.label: Causal chain
causal_chain.visualDirection: Present the first causal layer as a simple abstract mechanism or formula.

process_flow.label: Process flow
process_flow.visualDirection: Turn the mechanism into directional movement so cause and effect read instantly.

feedback_loop.label: Feedback loop
feedback_loop.visualDirection: Reveal the deeper feedback structure with denser motion and higher visual complexity.

data_lens.label: Data lens
data_lens.visualDirection: Shift to a data-centric visual that feels analytical and system-wide.

real_world_example.label: Real-world example
real_world_example.visualDirection: Bring the abstract explanation back to a concrete everyday environment.

externality.label: Externality
externality.visualDirection: Show hidden side effects with ecological or externality imagery.

macro_context.label: Macro context
macro_context.visualDirection: Zoom outward and frame the topic as part of a wider long-range pattern.

takeaway.label: Takeaway
takeaway.visualDirection: Return to a clear icon-driven summary that points toward action.

conclusion.label: Conclusion
conclusion.visualDirection: Close on people again so the system explanation resolves back to human consequence.
